mandatory_first_slide.note: Always the first entry. Title and presenter context.

mandatory_last_slide.note: Always the last entry. Thank-you and presenter names.

structure_rules.total_slides: minimum 4, maximum 10 including cover and closing

rules: outline is slide planning metadata, not page layout
each key under outline is a slide title
use only supported role, tone, and preferred_variant values
key_points should be concise source-grounded strings
page_size is an integer slide count hint
first slide must be cover (title_page), last slide must be closing (closing_page)

표지.description: 발표의 첫 인상을 만드는 표지 슬라이드.

key_points: 청중이 다음 해결책으로 자연스럽게 넘어가게 한다.
원인 분석.description: 원인 요소를 구분해 보여주고 다음 슬라이드의 해결책과 연결한다.

variant_selection_guide.content_card_grid: 2-5 distinct items that benefit from individual card layout (default for detail with 2-5 key_points)
variant_selection_guide.content_steps: sequential steps or process (use for solution role)
variant_selection_guide.content_split_band: analysis with top summary band + two lower panels
variant_selection_guide.content_sidebar: strong key message + supporting detail list
variant_selection_guide.content_highlight_split: bold left callout + right bullet content
variant_selection_guide.content_compact: summary with highlight card (use for summary role)
variant_selection_guide.content_box_list: standard list with accent banner highlight (use when no other variant fits)
